title: Grant Life Cycle — New Faculty Development Seminar Slides
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-10-31 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Grant Life Cycle' presented by Dr. Farin Kamangar (MD, PhD), Associate Vice President for Research. Walks new faculty through the complete grant lifecycle from idea conception through proposal submission, award, post-award management, and closeout. A companion seminar 'Lifecycle of Sponsored Research' was delivered 2023-11-01 by Justin Bonny, PhD (PDF: 2023-11-01_Bonny_ora_newfaculty_grant_lifecycle.pdf). Zoom recording of the 2022 session: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/w8-sU7mToDsQNlmrNGmCc45HWuZXi7xGSxgMaV86VtdrtQ2lkX4ZX8C9gu1xs1kl.GHm-OYiRIX7DbG6f
